title: delivery::fan_out: relay_inbox.clone() for HashSet where borrow would work
description:
LOCATION: src/delivery.rs:99

FINDING: seen.insert(relay_inbox.clone()) clones the String from the query row so that HashSet<String> can take ownership. The same seen set already holds to_string() copies from the follower loop (line 77). The relay loop at line 99 could avoid the clone by using relay_inbox.as_str() and changing seen to HashSet<&str> borrowing from the rows slice, or by deduplicating a different way.

IMPACT: One String clone per active relay per fan_out call. Low impact for typical relay counts (1-3), but the inconsistency between the follower loop (.to_string()) and relay loop (.clone()) obscures intent.
close_reason: Fixed: fan_out uses HashSet<&str> with borrows
